name: extra-top-level-files
description: Packs with extra top-level entries (other than manifest.json, artifacts/, attestations/) must be rejected per spec Section 5.2

tests.description: README at root level is not permitted
LICENSE at root level is not permitted
Extra JSON file at root is not permitted
Dotfiles at root are not permitted
Extra directories at root are not permitted
Files in extra directories are not permitted

notes: Per spec Section 5.2, verification must reject any top-level entry other than manifest.json, artifacts/, or attestations/
